messages.subject: [R-meta] (Advanced) Meta-Analysis Course: September 24-26, 2025
messages.body_plain:
Hi all,

As some of you may know, I occasionally teach courses on meta-analysis, including my 'regular' meta-analysis course (https://www.wvbauer.com/doku.php/course_ma) and an 'advanced' meta-analysis course (https://www.wvbauer.com/doku.php/course_advma).

I have finally been able to schedule another round of the advanced course, which will take place September 24-26, 2025.

Since my regular meta-analysis course is also somewhat overdue, I decided to extend the advanced course by an extra day to cover the standard methods more thoroughly. Therefore, this course is also suitable for motivated researchers new to meta-analysis that also want to delve into advanced methods (which are often needed in practice anyway).

All information about the course and registration information can be found at:

https://www.wvbauer.com/doku.php/course_advma

Feel free to share this with colleagues and students who may also be interested.

Best,
Wolfgang

--
Wolfgang Viechtbauer, PhD, Statistician | Department of Psychiatry and
Neuropsychology | Maastricht University | PO Box 616 (VIJV1) | 6200 MD
Maastricht, The Netherlands | +31(43)3884170 | https://www.wvbauer.com
